title: Russia invades Ukraine — Black Sea grain exports halted
description: Full-scale invasion. Ukraine's Black Sea ports blockaded. Wheat prices surged 60% in weeks.

title: Sunflower oil price hits $2,300/MT — all-time record
description: Ukraine-Russia combined 75% of global sunflower oil exports. Trade stopped. Price 2.5x in 6 weeks.

title: Wheat peaks at $430/MT — 14-year high
description: Market panicked as global inventories strained. Egypt and other import-dependent nations faced crises.

title: Black Sea Grain Initiative signed
description: UN-brokered deal allows Ukraine to export grain via Black Sea. Wheat prices fell 20% in days.

title: First Ukrainian grain ship departs Odesa
description: First grain export ship leaves Odesa port under UN deal. Corn and wheat markets stabilized.

title: Russia withdraws from Black Sea Grain Initiative
description: Russia ends grain deal. Wheat prices jumped 8% in one day on concerns over supply.

title: Russia attacks Odesa grain ports
description: Russian strikes on Odesa port infrastructure further disrupted grain export capacity.

title: EU bans Russian and Belarusian fertilizer exports
description: Fertilizer prices doubled as Russia (world's largest exporter) faced sanctions/logistics barriers.

title: EU gas prices hit €340/MWh — food production cost crisis
description: Gas shortage from Russia cuts caused ammonia plant shutdowns across Europe. Fertilizer supply risk.

title: Houthi attacks disrupt Red Sea food trade routes
description: Red Sea attacks forced ships to reroute. Food freight costs rose 250%. Import-dependent nations affected.

title: Sudan civil war destroys Darfur harvest
description: RSF forces burned crops in Darfur. Sudan faces worst food crisis in decades. 18M food insecure.

title: Kakhovka dam destruction floods Ukrainian farmland
description: Nova Kakhovka dam blown up. 100,000+ hectares of irrigated farmland destroyed or flooded.

title: Ukraine farmland de-mining program begins
description: Ukraine begins systematic de-mining of agricultural land. 25% of farmland still contaminated.

title: USDA raises Ukraine corn export forecast
description: Ukraine corn exports recovering via Danube river route. 2024 harvest expectations improved.

title: Gaza ceasefire reduces Middle East food insecurity risk
description: Gaza ceasefire reduces risk of broader Middle East war. Egyptian wheat import stability improved.
